data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: Amazon employs a microservices architecture to allow independent deployment and scalability of services.
data.technical_spec: Spring Boot, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS Lambda

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: To manage immense traffic, Amazon uses advanced load balancing techniques.
data.technical_spec: Elastic Load Balancing, Auto Scaling Groups

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Utilizes a combination of SQL and NoSQL databases to handle diverse data needs.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: For faster global content delivery, Amazon uses a CDN strategy.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Leverages cloud services to ensure high availability and resilience.
